attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.UOM_CLASS, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.BASE_UOM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_TL, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.DISABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.LANGUAGE_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.SOURCE_LANG, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL,
  (
 select UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL
 minus
 select UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MEASURE_TL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE and ACM.LANGUAGE_CODE=STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.LANGUAGE_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MSR_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_UNITS_OF_MEASURE_TL)
